hero.title: Developer
hero.description: FullStack Developer with over 3 years of experience in designing and deploying high-performance web and mobile applications. Expert in process optimization via CI/CD and Docker.

about.title: Who am I?
about.intro: Passionate FullStack Developer with over 3 years of experience in designing and deploying high-performance web and mobile applications.
about.paragraph1: Expert in development process optimization through CI/CD pipelines and Docker, I am passionate about AI solutions integration and Agile project management.
about.paragraph2: I master NextJs, Angular, Flutter for frontend, Node.js, Laravel, Springboot for backend, as well as Docker, Github Action and Google Cloud Platform for DevOps.

skills.title: My technical arsenal
skills.description: Modern technologies to build robust and scalable applications

projects.title: Recent projects
projects.description: A selection of my most notable achievements

architecture.title: My standard: Hexagonal Architecture
architecture.description: I use this architecture to cleanly separate business logic (the app's core) from technical tools (databases, interfaces). It's like building a house where you can change the decoration or the type of air conditioner without touching the load-bearing walls: the application is more stable, easier to test and ready to evolve.

modal.demoIntro: This demo version works without a persistent backend. Use the following credentials to test different roles:

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Have a project in mind? Don't hesitate to contact me

footer.brand: FullStack Developer passionate about creating innovative digital solutions.

linkyza.title: Linkyza - Digital Products Sales Platform
linkyza.description: Simple and fast digital products sales platform that aims to replace traditional sales platforms and integrate more turnkey options to manage everything in one place.

k-sport.title: K-Sport Agency
k-sport.description: Sports management agency specializing in supporting high-level athletes (football, basketball and more). Career management, negotiation and image development.
k-sport.longDescription: K-Sport is a sports management agency dedicated to the support, development and enhancement of athletes' careers, with a modern, strategic and human vision of the professional athlete. Founded with the ambition to reveal and structure talents, K-Sport acts as a trusted partner for athletes, their families and clubs.

items: Optimization of the athlete's sporting progression
Securing and guiding career choices
Development of visibility and brand image
Facilitating opportunities with international clubs
Career management: Global management from the field to strategic choices
Negotiation: Active search for clubs and contracts with licensed agents
Image & Com: Development of media and digital visibility
Advice: Personalized support at every stage of the journey

meetly.title: Meetly - AI Meeting Hub
meetly.description: Online meeting application assisted by AI with AWS S3 recording, Gemini AI transcription, synthesis and meeting analysis.

medin-plus.title: Medin Plus - Medical Network
medin-plus.description: Social network web application for doctors with clinical case sharing and professional collaboration. Closed and secure access available only for registered doctors.

hugbot.title: Hugbot Chat AI - All in one chat
hugbot.description: A chatbot that integrates more and more networks and sales channels to get the desired information without having to go to different platforms. You can follow everything in one place.

fluidio.title: Fluidio Shop
fluidio.description: Innovative e-commerce platform connecting sellers, buyers and affiliates. A smooth shopping experience with geolocation and integrated affiliation system.
fluidio.longDescription: To build this multi-actor e-commerce platform (sellers, buyers, affiliates), I selected a set of robust libraries focused on performance, scalability and user experience.
features: Real-time geolocation of shops and products
Complete stock and order management for sellers
Optimized buyer interface for smooth navigation
Detailed analytical dashboard for sales tracking

items: BLoC (Business Logic Component): Using the BLoC design pattern for a strict separation between the user interface and business logic, ensuring a testable and maintainable application.
GetIt: Implementation of dependency injection to decouple modules and facilitate instance management (services, repositories).
Freezed & JsonSerializable: Code generation for immutable data models and secure JSON serialization.
Isar Database: Ultra-fast NoSQL database for local storage and offline support.
Dio & Http: Advanced REST API call management with interceptors and global error handling.
Cached Network Image: Bandwidth and fluidity optimization through intelligent image caching.
Flutter Map (OpenStreetMap): Integration of interactive maps for sales point location without dependency on proprietary paid services.
Geolocator & Geocoding: Distance calculation services and address to GPS coordinates transformation.
FL Chart: Interactive analytical dashboards for sales and affiliate commission tracking.
Shimmer: Improving speed perception through elegant loading indicators.
QR Flutter: QR code generation system for quick transaction validation or seller profile sharing.
Just Audio & Record: Support for voice messages or audio descriptions within the platform.
Image & File Picker: Smooth management of product catalog uploads and identity documents.
Share Plus: Social sharing features to boost affiliate marketing.

pepites-academy.title: Pépites Academy
pepites-academy.description: Elite training center for young African football talents. The training division of K-Sport Agency.
pepites-academy.longDescription: Pepites Academy was born from a simple vision: to offer young African talents the resources, supervision and opportunity to reach the top of world football. As the training division of K-Sport Agency, the academy ensures a smooth transition between training and the professional world.
features: Detection and personalized support for young talents
Unique synergy with K-Sport Agency for career management

items: 150+ Young people supervised and trained
10+ Talents already detected at national level
5+ Elite partners internationally
Creation in 2025 for lasting impact
Excellence: High standards in all activities
Discipline: Rigor at the heart of training
Inclusivity: Welcome of all talents
Passion: Love of football as the driving force
